headlines.title: Fake Trump and Oprah ads fuel a wave of Medicare scams on Facebook, report says
headlines.description: Meta, the parent of Facebook and Instagram, is failing to stop scammers who repeatedly buy ads on the platforms to target seniors with scams, a new report says.

headlines.title: Sam Altman testifies at trial that Elon Musk ‘tried to kill’ OpenAI twice
headlines.description: Altman is defending himself against Musk’s claims that he’s trying to enrich himself at the expense of OpenAI’s original nonprofit mission.

headlines.title: Authorities say she asked ChatGPT about mixing alcohol and meds. Then, two men turned up dead.
headlines.description: Kim So-young is accused of asking ChatGPT for lethal dosing advice before giving three men benzodiazepine-laced drinks. Two died.

headlines.title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella testifies in OpenAI trial
headlines.description: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella took the witness stand in a trial about control of the artificial intelligence startup OpenAI.

headlines.title: Lawsuit says ChatGPT told FSU shooter that targeting children would bring more attention
headlines.description: OpenAI faces a lawsuit alleging that ChatGPT played a role in a mass shooting at Florida State University in April 2025 that left two people dead.

headlines.title: OpenAI co-founder says he feared Musk would 'physically attack' him
headlines.description: Co-founder Greg Brockman said he had a tense confrontation with Musk after there was a disagreement about potential equity shares in OpenAI.

headlines.title: Trump says he doesn't think about Americans' financial situation during Iran negotiations
headlines.description: President Trump told reporters that he doesn't think about Americans' financial situations during negotiations about the war with Iran. "Not even a little bit," he said, emphasizing that he only thinks about Iran not acquiring a nuclear weapon.

headlines.title: Pentagon considering renaming Iran war ‘Sledgehammer’ if ceasefire collapses
headlines.description: The U.S. military is considering officially re-naming the war with Iran to “Operation Sledgehammer” if the current ceasefire collapses

headlines.title: Van Hollen questions FBI Director Patel about alleged drinking problems
headlines.description: During a Senate hearing, Sen. Chris Van Hollen, D-Md., and FBI Director Kash Patel got into a heated exchange over allegations about the director's drinking.

headlines.title: Tuesday’s primaries to set up key fall matchups in Nebraska
headlines.description: Tuesday’s primary elections in Nebraska will set the stage for November in a battleground House district, as well as a potentially competitive Senate contest, as Democrats try to win control of Congress.

headlines.title: Inside China’s battle for electric vehicle dominance
headlines.description: Tom Llamas takes a Chinese electric vehicle for a test drive to see why brands like BYD are dominating the global market and why a 100% U.S. tariff is part of what’s keeping them out of American driveways.

headlines.title: Trump Mobile phone release date still uncertain
headlines.description: Nearly a year has passed since the announcement of the Trump Mobile wireless service, but its release date remains uncertain due to delays. NBC News’ Brian Cheung reports on the phone’s development, and what it means for customers who have paid deposits.
